title: Toilet Brushes Set - White Plastic Toilet Cleaner Brushes with 4 Replaceable Brush Heads, Ergonomic Handle & Soft Flexible Bristles for Home&Hotel Bathroom Toilet Cleaning
features: 【Compact Size & Full Set】Each toilet brush measures 8 x 8 x 40 cm, perfectly sized for any bathroom. The set includes 2 toilet brushes with holders and 4 replaceable brush heads, ensuring long-lasting use and great value

【360° Dense Bristles for Deep Cleaning】Equipped with sturdy, high-density bristles, the brush delivers powerful scrubbing to remove stubborn stains under the rim and in hard-to-reach spots—without scratching your porcelain surfaces

【Closed & Hygienic Holder Design】The enclosed holder keeps the brush neatly stored out of sight, prevents unpleasant odors, and allows quick drying with its vented base. Maintain a clean, hygienic, and odor-free bathroom effortlessly

【Splash Guard & Long Handle】Designed with a protective splash guard and extended handle, the toilet brush keeps your hands dry and safe during cleaning. The stable, weighted base prevents tipping or spills, keeping your floor spotless

【Replaceable Heads & Space-Saving Storage】Comes with 4 detachable brush heads for easy replacement, extending the service life of your brushes. The compact, modern design saves space, making it ideal for homes, hotels, and even small bathrooms
description: 【Qudubuy】Transform Your Space, Elevate Your Life Our products are designed to help you maintain a cleaner, more organized space, while elevating your everyday life with simple yet effective designs. Quality, practicality, and style come together to provide you with the best experience possible. Features and Details Color: White Material: Plastic Size: 8 x 8 x 40 cm 【Package Includes】 2 x Toilet Brush Holder and Handle 4 x Toilet Brush Heads Care and Maintenance Easy to Clean: The brush heads are detachable for easy cleaning. Simply twist off the brush head from the handle and rinse it under water. Replaceable Brush Heads: The brush heads can be replaced when needed, ensuring a long-lasting and effective cleaning solution. Each set includes 4 replaceable heads, allowing you to maintain cleanliness without frequent replacements. Avoid Over-wetting: To maintain your brush holder’s hygiene, ensure the brush is stored upright and properly dried after use. Upgrade Your Bathroom with Qudubuy Toilet Brushes – Keep Your Space Clean, Hygienic, and Stylish!
